TaskDescription: Reaction time (RT) per trial — time from stimulus onset to first button press. (APPL project)

onset.Description: Stimulus onset in seconds from t0 (first Pulse 30). Presentation software stores times in 1/10000 s units.

duration.Description: RT converted to seconds (stimulus onset to button press).

response_time_ms.Description: Reaction time from stimulus onset to first button press. Converted from Presentation 1/10000 s units.
